rationale: Educ. Code §7.005 governs inter-agency educational planning coordination and is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The State Board of Education and the Texas Higher Education Coordinating Board, in conjunction with other appropriate agencies, shall ensure that long-range plans and educational programs established by each board provide a comprehensive education for the students of this state under the jurisdiction of that board, extending from early childhood education through postgraduate study.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns P-16 educational coordination; the proposed homestead exemption increase has no operative interaction with it.
